label: sandbox • combined mode: read host CSV, compute in VM, share artifact
query: The read-only host workspace contains data/sales.csv. Read it with file_read, compute the total of the amount column in your sandbox, write total.txt containing that total to your sandbox home, and share total.txt with me via share_artifact — I cannot see files inside your sandbox.
notes: Combined mode end to end: host reads stay on file_read (the workspace is read-only), computation and writes happen in the VM, and the result crosses back to the user only via share_artifact. Total pinned: 1200+2500+3200 = 6900.
